title: GraphQL Federation: Composing Distributed APIs
author: Riley Brooks
API Architect
description: Build federated GraphQL schemas across microservices—but resolver complexity explodes
content:
Apollo Federation composes multiple GraphQL services into a unified API gateway.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Query Apocalypse (2036)](/docs/articles/query-apocalypse-2036)
